body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Use `t_start + Δt_cpl` instead of `Δt_cpl` to avoid implicit assumption that `t_start = 0`

closes #1147
title: use t_start correctly in driver

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Implement a simple `PrescribedOceanSimulation` model that reads in SST from prescribed data at each timestep. This will allow us to remove the SST reading from the driver.

Second and final part of #1136

## Content
- [x] add new `PrescribedOceanSimulation` type that reads in prescribed data during init and step
  - this simulation has very similar behavior to the existing `SurfaceStub` type, with the addition of reading prescribed data
- [x] add `AbstractSurfaceStub` type that `SurfaceStub` and `PrescribedOceanSimulation` both extend to share methods between these two very similar models
- [x] add tests
- [x] rename `land_area_fraction` to `land_fraction` for naming consistency with area fractions of other surface models
- [x] check AMIP CI results
title: implement PrescribedOceanSim to read in SST
